author: doll-agent
content: Implemented average(a, weights, axis) in ferray-stats::reductions. Without weights, delegates to mean(); with weights, computes sum(a*w)/sum(w) along the requested axis. weights.shape() must equal a.shape() (1-D-along-axis broadcasting omitted; broadcast yourself if needed). Errors on weight-sum-zero. Re-exported via ferray-stats lib.rs and umbrella ferray crate. 5 unit tests.
